records.blocker: Transitive via openfig-cli; npm audit fix did not reduce final advisory count without unrelated lockfile churn.
No fix available through current openfig-cli@0.4.7 dependency range.
No fully fixed compatible release verified in this repo yet.

decision: Do not apply partial lockfile churn that leaves the advisory count unchanged. Keep OpenFig tooling pinned until a compatible fixed openfig-cli release or verified override exists.
operationalGuard: Do not run OpenFig tooling as a network-exposed server in this project.
Keep OpenFig usage limited to local/CI file parsing and asset extraction.
Re-run this review when tools/design-import/package-lock.json changes.
